name: yellow-reader
description: Yellow - 简洁强大的移动端阅读器

scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.deploy:ota: npm run build && npx gh-pages -d dist -m "deploy: OTA update [skip ci]"
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx gh-pages -d dist -m "deploy: full release [skip ci]" && npx cap open android
scripts.release: node -e "const v=require('./public/version.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('git add . && git commit -m v'+v+' && git tag -a v'+v+' -m v'+v+' && git push origin main v'+v,{stdio:'inherit'})"
